commit.message:
fix(pd): service filter;

- Remove rounding for service performance calculation.

feat(misc): changelog;

- Added change log file.

fix(tests): make service;

- No rounding for performance.

@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+Log level for the Resource mimetype validator has been changed from `INFO` to `DEBUG`

     blacklist.extend(config_blacklist)

+    # (canada fork only): info -> debug log level

         log.warning(
